steps: Go to https://app.brevo.com and log in (or create a free account)
Click your account name in the top-right corner and select 'SMTP & API' from the dropdown
Enter a descriptive name for the key and click 'Generate'
Copy the API key immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Brevo API key, sent in the 'api-key' request header

notes: API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately or you will need to generate a new one
You can create multiple API keys for different applications and revoke them individually
Rate limits vary by plan; free plan allows limited API calls per day

test_endpoint.description: Retrieves your account details including plan and remaining email credits
